rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow entrepreneurs to privately approach firms or angel investors with their ideas implemented at different levels for funding and mentorship.
The system shall provide profiles for investors and entrepreneurs where they describe what they are looking for.
The system shall enable entrepreneurs to request investors or mentors from different states for submitting their ideas.
The system shall allow investors to call for a presentation of an idea if they like it.
The system shall enable mentors to provide mentorship.
The system shall allow users to view and apply for government loans and policies through the portal.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow entrepreneurs to privately approach firms or angel investors with their ideas implemented at different levels for funding and mentorship.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Startup meet is a platform for people to privately approach firms or angel investors with their ideas implemented at different levels for funding and mentorship.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide profiles for investors and entrepreneurs where they will be describing about what they are looking for.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The entrepreneur has to request investors or mentors from different states for submitting his ideas. Once accepted he can send an abstract about it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable entrepreneurs to request investors or mentors from different states for submitting their ideas.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The entrepreneur has to request investors or mentors from different states for submitting his ideas.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow investors to call for a presentation of an idea if they like it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the investors like it, they can call for a presentation of it.
The mentors also can give mentorship.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow users to view and apply government loans and policies through the portal.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The government loans and policies can be viewed and also be applied through the portal.
